pr.title: Add inline field editing with copy/lock/pencil icons to all LLM preview modals
pr.body:
LLM preview modals (lesson plan and syllabus) had no way to edit individual generated fields without regenerating. Copy and lock icons were also missing from lesson plan fields.

## Changes

**New `PencilIcon` component** — pencil SVG consistent with existing icon set.

**New state & helpers**
- `editingLessonField` / `lessonFieldDraft` — tracks which lesson field is being edited and its draft value (one field at a time)
- `lockedLessonFields: Set<string>` — per-field lock state for lesson plan
- `editingSyllabusSection` / `syllabusSectionDraft` — same pattern for syllabus sections
- `saveLessonFieldEdit(key)` — dispatches draft to the appropriate state slice based on field key (e.g. `"slide-2"` → updates `lessonPlanPreview.slides[2]`)

**Syllabus preview** — pencil icon added next to existing copy + lock buttons; clicking opens an inline `<textarea>` that writes back to `sectionContents[i]` on save.

**Lesson plan preview** — copy + lock + pencil icons added to every editable unit across all four tabs:

| Tab | Editable units |
|---|---|
| Header | Presentation title |
| Intro | "Where This Fits", "Key Terms" |
| Slides | Each slide (first line = title, remaining lines = bullets) |
| Assignment | Overview, each step (first line = title), Tools list, Deliverables list |
| Rubric | Raw rubric text |

**New CSS classes** — `fieldLabelRow`, `fieldEditWrap`, `fieldEditArea`, `fieldEditActions`, `fieldEditSaveBtn`, `fieldEditCancelBtn` — reuses existing token variables and button styles for consistency.

Edits persist into the same state objects used by download/export, so any manual changes are reflected in exported files.
pr.author: Copilot
